purpose: Rescue the 12 basis-error salty-snacks drops from TASK-237 by re-sourcing REAL per-100g nutrition panels + Hebrew ingredients from the Shufersal product page (Yochananof pages carried per-serving panels mislabeled as per-100g, kcal 47-132/100g). Identity + image stay Yochananof; only PANEL + INGREDIENTS come from Shufersal for recovered products. Re-score on the UNCHANGED engine (data re-source, not a scoring change). OFF stays removed (salty-snacks-LOCAL).
identity_method: Shufersal name-based search (EAN-search returns 0); ACCEPT ONLY when the candidate product page's JSON-LD gtin13 == the full target barcode. Name similarity alone NOT trusted (same-line-different-flavor and same-name-different-barcode collisions were observed and rejected).
per_100g_verification: Shared bsip0_nutrition multi-table parser selects the per-100g panel; accepted only when basis classified per_100g AND Atwater (4*protein+4*carbs+9*fat) within 0.80-1.25 of stated kcal AND kcal in the real-snack window 300-600/100g.
